---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as documented
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Repro steps**
1. …
2. …

**Did you check [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/jaysonventura/claude-dev-team#troubleshooting)?**
- [ ] Yes

**Environment**
- Claude Code version: `claude --version`
- OS: (macOS / Linux + version)
- Surface: (CLI / VS Code / JetBrains / desktop)
- claude-dev-team version: (see the README badge / `plugin.json`)

**Logs / output**
Paste relevant output (redact any secrets). Helpful: `~/.claude/bin/cdt-setup --show` (masked),
`~/.claude/bin/cdt-menubar status`, or `claude --debug`.
